properties.property: -- Auto-converted from GraalScript -- // NPC made by Mighty -- join("sign"); -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) { -- setstring this.text, -- Spar Commands: -- #b- "join spar" -- #b(Adds you to the spar queue) -- #b- "view queue" -- #b(Displays the spar queue) -- #b -- #b- "leave queue" -- #b(Removes you from the spar -- #bqueue) -- #b- "done" -- #b(Removes you from the spar, but -- #bonly if the spar has not started) -- #b- "start / stop" -- #b(Begins / ends the spar. Both -- #bsparrers are required to use) -- #b- "focus on / focus off" -- #b(Sets your focus to the center -- #bof the spar area) -- #b- "heal" -- #b(Heals your character, but only -- #bif you are not in an enabled spar) -- }
